calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Compelling Trustees To Provide Information And An Accounting, Removing Trustees And Appointing New Trustee, And Remedying Breach
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Baron Miller appeared by zoom for Jerrell Cross.
Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for and with Dinell Cross by zoom.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the issue of where the principal place of administration of the trust is, and whether San Francisco County or Sacramento County is the proper venue. Upon conclusion of argument, the Petition for Order Compelling Trustees to Provide Information and an Accounting, Removing Trustees and Appointing New Trustee, and Remedying Breach is denied for lack of venue in San Francisco.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.

Petition For Order Compelling Trustees To Provide Information And An Accounting, Removing Trustees And Appointing New Trustee, And Remedying Breach
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Oct-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
